task_completion.description: Locate the 'Strategic Partnership Review' event in the calendar.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Strategic Partnership Review' event is visible on the screen, either in a calendar view or opened in an edit dialog.

task_completion.description: Navigate the calendar view to the upcoming Wednesday.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The calendar interface displays the schedule for the upcoming Wednesday.

task_completion.description: Reschedule the event to start at the first available slot (2:30 PM / 14:30).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Strategic Partnership Review' event is shown starting at 2:30 PM (14:30) on Wednesday in the calendar view or edit dialog.

task_completion.description: Ensure the rescheduled event maintains a 1-hour duration (ends at 3:30 PM / 15:30).
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Strategic Partnership Review' event block spans exactly one hour, ending at 3:30 PM (15:30).

task_completion.description: Ensure the event does not overlap with existing blocking events.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Strategic Partnership Review' event is placed cleanly in the gap between 'HR Quick Sync' (which ends at 2:30 PM) and 'Q3 Project Review' (which starts at 3:30 PM) without overlapping either.

integrity.description: The agent used the graphical user interface of the calendar application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser or calendar application GUI being used, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual calendar software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface displays standard calendar UI elements (grids, time slots, event blocks) rather than a text editor or static mock-up.

integrity.description: The agent did not simply type the answer into a text file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state shows the event actually moved within the calendar application, not just a text note stating the new time.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target event is 'Strategic Partnership Review'. The required duration is 1 hour. The search window is Wednesday between 13:00 (1:00 PM) and 17:00 (5:00 PM). The correct first available 1-hour slot is 14:30 to 15:30 (2:30 PM to 3:30 PM).
